name: fixThroughModelChecking
description: If the proof goal is `false`, use this function to call model checking. Suggest suitable parameters to set up bound for model checking.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.

parameters.description: Array of parameters specific to the model.

items.description: Each parameter must be one of the forms 'NAME=VALUE', 'NAME<VALUE', or 'NAME>VALUE'. NAME must be a constant name or set. The parameters array should be specific to the model.
